profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Goodyear Indonesia Tbk manufactures, imports, exports, distributes, wholesale tires for vehicles, motorbikes, airplanes and other related components. The company was formerly known as NV The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company Limited and changed its name to PT Goodyear Indonesia Tbk in July 1978. The company was founded in 1917 and is headquartered in Bogor, Indonesia. PT Goodyear Indonesia Tbk operates as a subsidiary of The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company.
profil.berita_terkini: ⚠️ Laporan keuangan dalam USD, harga dalam IDR. Rasio (ROE/ROA/margin) tetap valid, tetapi valuasi per-saham (EPS/PER/PBV/DCF) tidak akurat tanpa konversi kurs.
